commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: optimize refresh to only request visible pins from backend

When the tree view is collapsed (components not expanded), we no longer
need to poll pins that aren't visible. This reduces network traffic between
TUI and bridge server significantly.

Changes:
- Added getVisiblePinNames() to TreeView to get list of currently visible pins
- Added VisiblePinNames struct to track visible pin list with mutex
- Added updateVisiblePinsFilter() to Model, called after tree navigation
- Modified refreshPinsRemote() to filter pins based on visible_pin_names
- When filter is active, only visible pins are updated from backend
- Stale detection is disabled when filtering is active

This optimization is especially important when:
- Tree is fully collapsed (only components visible, no pins)
- Many pins exist but only a few are expanded
- Running over network with latency

The filter updates on every tree navigation event (arrows, Enter, Space).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

1. 마이크로 카메라 쉐이크 (CoinController + init.client.luau)
   - Bronze 0.02 / Silver 0.04 / Gold 0.06 코인별 강도 차별화
   - Diamond는 기존 강한 쉐이크(0.3) 유지

2. 파티클 튜닝 (CoinController._createParticlePool)
   - Lifetime: 0.5~1.0s → 0.1~0.25s (팡! 느낌)
   - Speed: 5~15 → 15~35 (폭발적 속도)
   - Acceleration: +y(부유) → -40y(중력, 낙하)
   - SpreadAngle: 180→80 (집중 방향성)
   - 코인별 방출 수: Bronze 10 / Silver 14 / Gold 22 / Diamond 35

3. HUD 카운터 바운스 (UIController.UpdateCoins)
   - 수집 시 TextSize +7pt 즉시 → 0.2s Back 이징으로 복귀

4. 피버 카메라 줌인 (FeverController + init.client.luau)

5. Highlight DepthMode 수정 (CharacterEffectsController)

Update author name from Jose R to Joseph Morgan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix WS stale-close race and broken invite link

roomGame.ts: stale 'close' event (React StrictMode double-mount or any
reconnect) was calling room.players.delete(playerId) on the *new* WS that
had already replaced it — so broadcastToRoom could no longer find the
player and advance_question was silently dropped, causing the answered
phase to hang forever. Fix: guard the close handler with a ws-identity
check (current ws === closing ws). Also re-add the player to
syncStates.playerIds on any reconnect so sync counts stay accurate.

invite link: roomCode state started empty until the first lobby poll,
so the copied URL was '/join/' with no code. Fix: pass rc=<roomCode> in
the navigate URL from CategoryPage and DashboardPage (join flow too),
seed useState from that param so the button is populated immediately.
Added disabled={!roomCode} guard and a window.prompt fallback for
environments where navigator.clipboard is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Z.ai concurrency guard and migrate provider URL

Adds a Durable Object-backed concurrency limiter for z-ai-pro routes to
enforce Z.ai published per-model in-flight limits. Requests exceeding
the limit receive a 429 before hitting upstream. Failures fail open so
a DO outage never blocks production traffic.

Also migrates the Z.ai base URL from bigmodel.cn to api.z.ai (verified
live), and fixes the credit-exhaustion retry path to release the
concurrency lease before falling back to OpenRouter.

Changes:
- New ProviderConcurrency DO with lease-based tracking and TTL expiry
- Service layer enforces limits only for z-ai-pro; all others pass through
- Concurrency acquire/release wired into legacy chat request path with
  correct stream lifecycle handling and idempotent release
- Release lease before credit-exhaustion retry to avoid holding z-ai-pro
  slot during OpenRouter fallback
- wrangler.toml: add PROVIDER_CONCURRENCY binding and v3 migration using
  new_classes (not new_sqlite_classes, DO is in-memory only)
- Updated Z.ai URL in router, docs, and tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: hardcode single worker per container, remove maxConcurrentWorkers config (#303)

Each worker container replica should process exactly one job at a time to
ensure full dev container isolation. Scaling is achieved by adding container
replicas, not by increasing concurrency within a single container.

The maxConcurrentWorkers parameter (previously defaulting to 3) suggested
multiple concurrent workers could safely share a container, but there is
nothing preventing collisions/conflicts between concurrent jobs in the
same workspace.

Co-authored-by: christrudelpw <chris@generacy.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: AbstractEntityMiddleware base class + complete middleware consolidation (phase 2) (#8169)

## Summary

Follows up on #8166, extending the middleware consolidation pattern
across all remaining routes.

- **`AbstractEntityMiddleware`** — new abstract base class encapsulating
the entity-loading pattern (get route param → 412, ORM query → 404,
`withAttribute`) used by all entity middleware. Each subclass only
implements `getRouteParamName()`, `getAttributeName()`, and
`loadEntity()`
- **`GroupMiddleware`, `DepositMiddleware`, `CalendarMiddleware`,
`KioskDeviceMiddleware`** — all refactored to extend
`AbstractEntityMiddleware`; also fixes a bug in `GroupMiddleware` that
was returning 412 instead of 404 for not-found entities
- **Route files** — entity-loading middleware wired to 17 routes across
5 files, removing all inline ORM loads and null guards from handlers
- **`InputSanitizationMiddleware`** — wired to every write route that
accepts text input; found and fixed a gap: `POST /{groupID}/roles`
(`roleName`) was missing sanitization
- **Bug fix** — `getEventSecondaryContact` had an inverted condition
(`!empty`) that threw 404 when the contact *was* found; fixed to `empty`

## Files changed

| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| **New** |
`src/ChurchCRM/Slim/Middleware/Api/AbstractEntityMiddleware.php` |
| **New** | `src/ChurchCRM/Slim/Middleware/Api/CalendarMiddleware.php` |
| **New** | `src/ChurchCRM/Slim/Middleware/Api/DepositMiddleware.php` |
| **New** |
`src/ChurchCRM/Slim/Middleware/Api/KioskDeviceMiddleware.php` |
| **Modified** | `src/ChurchCRM/Slim/Middleware/Api/GroupMiddleware.php`
|
| **Modified** | `src/api/routes/calendar/calendar.php` |
| **Modified** | `src/api/routes/calendar/events.php` |
| **Modified** | `src/api/routes/finance/finance-deposits.php` |
| **Modified** | `src/api/routes/people/people-groups.php` |
| **Modified** | `src/kiosk/routes/api/kiosks.php` |

## Middleware ordering

Slim 4 is LIFO:
`->add(InputSanitizationMiddleware)->add(EntityMiddleware)` runs
entity-loading first (outermost), then sanitizes the body, then calls
the handler. This is the correct order — no wasteful sanitization on
requests that will 404.

## Test plan

- [ ] Existing Cypress suite passes (behavior is unchanged — same auth,
same 404/412 responses, same handler logic)
- [ ] `GET /groups/999999` → 404 (GroupMiddleware now returns 404, was
412)
- [ ] `GET /deposits/999999` → 404
- [ ] `GET /api/calendars/999999` → 404
- [ ] `POST /kiosk/api/devices/999999/reload` → 404
- [ ] `POST /groups/{id}/roles` with XSS in `roleName` → name sanitized
in DB

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(statusline): unify cache TTLs into 3 tiers

Replace 4 separate TTL constants (PR_CACHE_TTL, CI_CACHE_TTL,
LIMITS_CACHE_TTL, SLOT_CACHE_TTL) with 3 semantic tiers:

- API_CACHE_TTL (120s) — anything that hits an API (CI, PR, limits)
- SLOT_CACHE_TTL (60s) — external commands (overridable in config)
- GH_CHECK_TTL (1800s) — gh CLI availability check (rarely changes)

PR was 300s, CI was 120s — no real reason for the difference since
both are GitHub API data. Now unified at 120s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(dashboard): ensure query_end fires when generator is abandoned early (#6326)

## Summary
- When `.show()` collects enough rows, it breaks out of the `run_iter`
generator early. Python sends `GeneratorExit` (a `BaseException`) which
none of the existing exception handlers caught, so `_notify_query_end`
was never called and the dashboard stayed stuck in "Finalizing" forever.
- Handle `GeneratorExit` in `run_iter` to notify subscribers before
returning.
- Add regression test that verifies `on_query_end` fires for both
`.collect()` and `.show()`.

Closes DF-1664

## Test plan
- [x] New test `test_show_fires_query_end` reproduces the bug (fails
without the fix, passes with it)
- [x] All existing subscriber tests pass (`tests/test_subscribers.py`)
- [x] Manually verified with the dashboard — query transitions from
Finalizing to Finished

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

feat(daemon): add ModelManager for model lifecycle management

Phase 3 of master execution plan complete.

Changes:
- spn-core: Add optional serde feature for IPC serialization
- spn-client: Enable serde feature, extend protocol with model commands
- spn-cli: Add spn-ollama dependency, create model_manager.rs
- daemon/handler: Add model command handlers (list, pull, load, unload, delete)
- daemon/server: Integrate ModelManager

IPC Protocol Extensions:
- MODEL_LIST: List installed models
- MODEL_PULL: Download a model
- MODEL_LOAD: Load model into memory with config
- MODEL_UNLOAD: Unload model from memory
- MODEL_STATUS: Get running models
- MODEL_DELETE: Delete a model

Response types:
- Models { models: Vec<ModelInfo> }
- RunningModels { running: Vec<RunningModel> }
- Success { success: bool }

Tests: All passing
Clippy: Zero errors

Fix sysbuild app Kconfig by using auto-detected conf file

The ZCMAKE_APPLICATION_EXTRA_CONF_FILE variable in sysbuild.cmake
was not working — the app's mcuboot.overlay.conf was never merged.
Zephyr 4.1.0 sysbuild auto-detects sysbuild/<image_name>.conf files,
so renaming to sysbuild/ceell-app.conf makes it auto-merge.

commit.message:
feat: synthetic TTS layer, document import, smart scheduler & processing panel

Add in-browser TTS synthesis using HeadTTS (Kokoro-82M) with time-stretched
audio matching via sonic-wasm. Includes document import pipeline (markdown/
text parsing, AI-driven section analysis, chunk-to-coordinate mapping),
dual PlaybackEngine for synthetic audio overlay, and a proximity-based
TTS scheduler that generates chunks nearest to the playhead first.

New processing panel with chunk mini-map visualization shows real-time
generation progress, ETA estimates, and per-chunk status. Worker loading
fixed via public-served HeadTTS modules with blob-worker interception
for Chrome compatibility.
